---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### AI-Assisted Name Matching Engine
A Python-based intelligent matching system to standardize and reconcile inconsistent entity names across datasets using similarity-based logic.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/mschethana/ai-name-matching-engine){.project-button}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Anomaly Detection & Analytics
Built an end-to-end fraud detection solution that combines Isolation Forest anomaly detection, LLM-generated explanations and Power BI analytics  to transform suspicious insurance claims into investigator-readable narratives.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/mschethana/Score-to-Story-Fraud-Detection){.project-button}
:::

:::
